Partnerships for the Goals.reasoning: The course explicitly aims to strengthen '團隊合作能力' (teamwork ability) and '溝通和表達能力' (communication and expression ability) through group discussions, which are foundational skills for effective multi-stakeholder partnerships (Targets 17.16, 17.17).
